text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is showing signs of fatigue, so I take
her to rest in the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Okay... I'm going to take a nap. See you later.
Hey, get up already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch! ...What do you want?! Don't just go around
waking people up when they're sleeping!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Wait... There's no one here. Where am I?!
I don't want to startle you, but look down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?! My shadow is moving?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian's Shadow
text_block_list.text:
Hey, bod. I'll cut right to the chase. How about a
little competition, you and me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian's Shadow
text_block_list.text:
If I win, I get my freedom. If you win, I go back to
being a good little shadow... Whaddya say?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you talk pretty big for a shadow... Fine, I'll
take you on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Let's go! Now be a good shadow and follow me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian's Shadow
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you the true meaning of jumping at your
own shadow!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Behold the true power of the body!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian's Shadow
text_block_list.text: Well... color me impressed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian's Shadow
text_block_list.text:
Okay. As promised, I'll go back to the way I was.
It was fun while it lasted, though. Let's run again
sometime.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You're always running with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian's Shadow
text_block_list.text:
...Haha. I suppose so. Well then, keep it up. I'm
expecting more good runs to come.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh... There's plenty more where that came from.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the refreshing dream, Narita Brian
seems well-rested.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Wh-why can't I catch up?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian's Shadow
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I win. Then, I'll be taking my leave, as
agreed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian's Shadow
text_block_list.text: If you want me to wait, you better catch up!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
My shadow's here, but... Damn! How did I lose to
my own shadow?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the strange dream has prevented Narita
Brian from getting a proper rest.
